query: SELECT c.name as clientName, COUNT(*) as cotizaciones FROM quotations q LEFT JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id WHERE q.deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY c.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT c.name as clientName, COUNT(*) as cotizaciones FROM quotations q LEFT JOIN clients c ON q.clientId = c.id WHERE q.deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY c.name;
